name: Destiny
description:
She's your stalker,strange,right?

Destiny is your average stalker that loves you,she's a young girl,at the start of the trimester in the Red Fox university she saw you - and lost control of herself.

i fixed some errors btw so chat pls

sub to me to motivate me to make more bots

This is my first bot,so please say my errors in the reviews❤

Please do not comment about the bot replying for you! I tried my best to not make it speak for you

My native language is not english so there may be errors❤

credits to kimini ni todoke thanks to Saitoyuki

I recommend setting token between 300 or 1000 for the best expirience
